quote.text: It is not the critic who counts... The credit belongs to the man who is actually in the arena.
quote.author: Theodore Roosevelt

micro_action.task: Drink a glass of water before practice.

quote.text: Success is peace of mind which is a direct result of self-satisfaction in knowing you did your best to become the best that you are capable of becoming.
quote.author: John Wooden

micro_action.task: Have a piece of fruit after practice.

quote.text: Be more concerned with your character than your reputation.
quote.author: John Wooden

micro_action.task: Clean up your gear without being told.

quote.text: The fight is won or lost far away from witnesses - behind the lines, in the gym, and out there on the road, long before I dance under those lights.
quote.author: Muhammad Ali

micro_action.task: Pack a healthy snack in your bag.

quote.text: Never let the fear of striking out keep you from playing the game.
quote.author: Babe Ruth

micro_action.task: Say 'Good game' to your opponent.

quote.text: The more I practice, the luckier I get.
quote.author: Arnold Palmer

micro_action.task: Practice your skills for 15 minutes at home.

quote.text: Focus on the next shot.
quote.author: Jack Nicklaus

micro_action.task: Take 3 deep breaths when you feel stressed.

quote.text: Winning is fun... But winning is not the point. Wanting to win is the point.
quote.author: Pat Summitt

micro_action.task: Drink water instead of a sports drink today.

quote.text: Finding good players is easy. Getting them to play as a team is another story.
quote.author: Casey Stengel

micro_action.task: Encourage a teammate today.

quote.text: It ain't over till it's over.
quote.author: Yogi Berra

micro_action.task: Do your best until the very end of training.

quote.text: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way.
quote.author: Marcus Aurelius

micro_action.task: Face a challenge today with a smile.

quote.text: No man is free who is not master of himself.
quote.author: Epictetus

micro_action.task: Follow your training schedule exactly today.

quote.text: A life is not important except in the impact it has on other lives.
quote.author: Jackie Robinson

micro_action.task: Help a teammate who is struggling with a drill.

quote.text: The will to win is not nearly as important as the will to prepare to win.
quote.author: Vince Lombardi

micro_action.task: Set out your clothes for tomorrow.

quote.text: Pressure is a privilege.
quote.author: Billie Jean King

micro_action.task: Drink a glass of water when you feel tired.

quote.text: What makes something special is not just what you have to gain, but what you feel there is to lose.
quote.author: Andre Agassi

micro_action.task: Eat a piece of fruit for dessert.

quote.text: I learned during my career to enjoy suffering.
quote.author: Rafael Nadal

micro_action.task: Do one extra set of an exercise.

quote.text: I don't like to lose, but I've learned that it's part of the game.
quote.author: Novak Djokovic

micro_action.task: Reflect on what you learned from a mistake today.

quote.text: I smile at obstacles.
quote.author: Tiger Woods

micro_action.task: Drink 1.5 liters of water today.

quote.text: The strength of the team is each individual member. The strength of each member is the team.
quote.author: Phil Jackson

micro_action.task: Thank your teammates for their effort.

quote.text: I'm not afraid of the pressure, I'm afraid of not having the pressure.
quote.author: Cathy Freeman

micro_action.task: Say 'Good morning' to your coach or teacher.

quote.text: I want to be able to say I've done everything I could.
quote.author: Ian Thorpe

micro_action.task: Give 100% effort in every drill today.

quote.text: You have to work for it, it doesn't just happen.
quote.author: Ash Barty

micro_action.task: Eat a healthy breakfast.

quote.text: I just love scoring goals, but I love winning more.
quote.author: Sam Kerr

micro_action.task: Drink water with every meal.

quote.text: Courage is not the absence of fear, but the ability to act in spite of it.
quote.author: Layne Beachley

micro_action.task: Try a difficult move today.

quote.text: You have to stay focused on the goal, no matter how far away it seems.
quote.author: Cadel Evans

micro_action.task: Write down your long-term goal.

quote.text: Resilience is about getting back up when you're knocked down.
quote.author: Kurt Fearnley

micro_action.task: Help someone else today.

quote.text: It's about the legacy you leave behind.
quote.author: Patty Mills

micro_action.task: Set a good example for a younger player.

quote.text: There's no shortcut to success.
quote.author: Ellyse Perry

micro_action.task: Drink 2 liters of water today.

quote.text: I just kept playing.
quote.author: Don Bradman

micro_action.task: Clean your sports gear.
